title: 35 Heads Orange Artificial Tulips, 7 Bunches Real Touch Flowers for Home Decoration - Faux Silk Flowers for Wedding, Spring Arrangements, Vase & Garden
features: Lifelike Artificial Tulips: Crafted from high-quality silk and PU materials, these faux tulips mimic real flowers with vibrant orange petals and flexible stems. Perfect for those searching for realistic artificial flowers or faux tulips that look real, adding a natural touch to any space.

Versatile Home & Event Decor: Use these 7PCS tulip flowers for wedding arrangements, spring decorations, or vase displays. Each bunch features 5 heads (35 total) for lush floral designs in homes, offices, or gardens.
Durable & Low Maintenance: Unlike fresh flowers, these artificial silk tulips require no watering, staying vibrant year-round. Ideal for indoor/outdoor decor and allergy-free environments.

Easy to Customize: Bendable stems allow you to shape the tulips for table centerpieces, wreaths, or farmhouse-style decor. A top choice for fake tulips with stems that blend seamlessly with real plants.
Ideal Gift & Seasonal Decor: A popular pick for spring artificial flowers and home garden party decor. Packaged securely for safe delivery, ready to brighten any room instantly.
description: Product Listing: Includes: 7 bunches of orange artificial tulips (35 flower heads). Material: Premium silk & PU for a realistic look and soft touch. Stem Length: 20" with bendable wire for customizable arrangements. Key Selling Points: ✔ Hyper-Realistic Design: Petals and stems mimic fresh tulips—ideal for home decor or photo props. ✔ All-Weather Durability: Suitable for outdoor gardens or indoor vase displays. ✔ Hassle-Free: No wilting or watering needed, perfect for busy households. Note: Colors may vary slightly due to screen settings. Hand wash recommended for cleaning.
